name: mcp-tooling
description: Parent hub for MCP tool bridges: routes to three workflow modes (mcp-chrome-devtools for browser inspection and debugging, mcp-click-up for ClickUp task management, mcp-aside-devtools for AI-browser automation via the Aside browser) plus three design transports (mcp-figma bridging to Figma Desktop, mcp-refero searching real-app UI design references via the Refero MCP, mcp-mobbin researching app/screen/flow design patterns via the Mobbin MCP) through mode-registry.json and hub-router.json. The advisor sees one hub identity; workflowMode selects the packet. mcp-code-mode is the shared MCP execution substrate all modes reach through the unchanged code_mode registration key — it is external infrastructure, not a hub member, and stays a flat standalone skill.
trigger_examples: Use Chrome DevTools to capture a HAR for the staging dashboard
Mark the ClickUp task done with a note
Render this component in Figma and export the tokens
Run an agentic Aside browser task and capture REPL evidence
Route this MCP tool bridge request
Find real-app screen references for a checkout flow on Refero
Research onboarding flow patterns from real apps on Mobbin
